title: EVA Roller Coaster
wikitext:
[]: EVA Roller Coaster             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Tue May 22, 2018 12:09 pm A roller coaster ride based on Neon Genesis Evangelion is set to be brought back to Universal Studios Japan.

[]: Re: EVA Roller Coaster             Quote Post by Ambiant23 » Tue May 22, 2018 1:08 pm Wow cool have you ever gone on it?

[]: Re: EVA Roller Coaster             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Tue May 22, 2018 1:11 pm No, I'm not the roller coaster type, but it certainly sounds cool.

[]: Re: EVA Roller Coaster             Quote Post by Ambiant23 » Tue May 22, 2018 1:58 pm I hear its more like space mountain in disney world but with Vr goggles

[]: Re: EVA Roller Coaster             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 22, 2018 3:56 pm Ambiant23 wrote: I hear its more like space mountain in disney world but with Vr goggles

[]: Re: EVA Roller Coaster             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Wed May 23, 2018 9:05 am Nothing hurts more than knowing I'll never be able to ride Evangelion XR You Can (Not) Survive. Like, it's basically just a normal-ass roller coaster with a VR headset, I can't imagine it can be too difficult to recreate using one of those roller coaster simulators with the same video playing on an Oculus or something. It's worse for me because I'm a theme park nut, EPCOT Centre was (or would have been had I ever gone while it was cool) my favorite theme park of all time, and knowing I'll never get to ride the original Journey into Imagination, or Horizons, or Universe of Energy (again, fuck GotG) or experience the brilliant Wonders of Life pavilion is so painful. That's why I feel it's so important to preserve these experiences, there will be people who will never have the opportunity to ride XR, people who will never even know it existed. I understand the plight of Yui in a way, but clearly on a much, MUCH smaller scale.

[]: Re: EVA Roller Coaster             Quote Post by Ambiant23 » Wed May 23, 2018 9:39 am I had a dream theme park idea that that basically is the geek/ counter culture park. Instead of Transformers rides in Universal we get Evangelion. And instead of of splash mountain we would ask Wes Anderson have a ride inspired by him. But of course this is just a dream park

[]: Re: EVA Roller Coaster             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Thu Aug 16, 2018 8:29 pm Add yet another reason for me to visit Japan for six months sometime in the future xD
